title: mandevilla athenastigma
intro: Mandevilla athenastigma, also known as the 'Rocktrumpet', is a type of flowering vine native to South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
